programme.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
programme.desc: Short Ribs braised with coffee.

programme.title: Entertaining With Emeril
programme.desc: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring some of the best breakfast to the table.

programme.title: Emeril's Bread Basket
programme.desc: Bruschetta; muffuletta; cornbread.

programme.title: We're Havin' a Bake Sale
programme.desc: Lemon Squares; Kicked-Up Oatmeal Cookies; Blueberry Raspberry Muffins; Snickerdoodles; Chocolate Swirl Bundt Cake.

programme.title: Scotland Judging
programme.desc: The two remaining Scottish chefs must cook their four courses again for the judges.

programme.title: South West Starter and Fish
programme.desc: For the starters, Joe goes out on a limb with his Beatles-inspired dish `My Octopus's Garden'.

programme.title: South West Mains and Dessert
programme.desc: Emily uses Cornish duck meat from her local producer that she pairs with grilled radicchio.

programme.title: South West Judging
programme.desc: The chefs need to impress judges Matthew Fort, Oliver Peyton, Andi Oliver, and a guest judge.

programme.title: Wales Starter and Fish Courses
programme.desc: Tom `Westy' Westerland, Cindy Challoner, and Andy Sheriden compete for a place in the final.

programme.title: Wales Main and Dessert
programme.desc: The chefs present their musically inspired mains and desserts aiming to secure a place in the final.

programme.title: Wales Judging
programme.desc: The two remaining chefs from Wales must cook their four course menus again.

programme.title: Northern Ireland Starter and Fish
programme.desc: The three chefs begin by cooking their starters for a surprise veteran of the competition.

programme.title: Northern Ireland Main and Dessert
programme.desc: Chris is cooking his interpretation of the classic beef dish Tournedos Rossini using guinea fowl.

programme.title: Italian Smokehouse
programme.desc: Frankie goes full on Italian steakhouse with Treviso salad, ice cold martinis, and Bistecca alla Fiorentina.

programme.title: Getting the Band Back Together
programme.desc: Frankie jams with his band and makes Shoyu Ramen, Tare Eggs, Chicken Meatballs, and a crispy Okonomiyaki.

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Pizza
programme.desc: Frankie makes pizza magic with two doughs, from Grilled Pizza to Grandma slices to honey-drizzled dessert.

programme.title: Pancake Stacks and Snacks for Two
programme.desc: Frankie makes breakfast for dinner with Banana Pancakes, Eggs Benny, Home Fries, Scrapple, and a boozy shake.

programme.title: Lunch That Goes the Distance
programme.desc: Frankie bikes with Date Balls, forages ramps for pasta, and serves Juicy Lucy burgers with his friend Will.

programme.title: Cooking with Chilli & Spice
programme.desc: Gordon uses chilli pepper and spices to create classic jerk chicken and a super simple spicy beef salad.

programme.title: Stress Free Cooking
programme.desc: Gordon’s tackles stress free cooking with recipes including meatballs four ways and chili chicken with ginger.

programme.title: Getting Started in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon cooks delicious pork chops with sweet and sour peppers helps you keep your knives sharp.

programme.title: Gordon's Guide to Brunch
programme.desc: Gordon cooks his ultimate brunch dishes, including spicy pancakes, a simple frittata and a cheese soufflé.

programme.title: Special Occasion Menus
programme.desc: Gordon cooks for special occasions, including stuffed lamb and Vietnamese-style prawn rolls.

programme.title: Stunning Seafood of Marseille
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille to explore the seafood, the flavors of Provence, and multicultural dishes.

programme.title: Fire
programme.desc: Things can change in an instant, as David Kinch discovered after a restaurant fire.

programme.title: Legacy
programme.desc: Food is evolution, and wise chefs never forget from whence they came.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Nothing is more calming or inspiring than the sea, which is a muse for David Kinch.

programme.title: Strawberry
programme.desc: David Kinch focuses his attention to the strawberry, at the height of its season.

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: For David Kinch, balance in life is as important as balance in a dish.

programme.title: Restrictions
programme.desc: Diners these days can be pickier than ever, and restrictions can be frustrating.

programme.title: Daniel Boulud
programme.desc: Chef Daniel Boulud stops by to create a classic French dish.

programme.title: Lidia Bastianich
programme.desc: Chefs Lidia Bastianich and Ming Tsai cook up the best of frutti di mare!

programme.title: Jacques Pepin
programme.desc: Jacques Pépin makes luscious Chicken Livers in a Mushroom Port Cranberry Sauce.

programme.title: Tiffani Faison
programme.desc: Chef Tiffani Faison cooks her favorite Vietnamese dish and Ming makes meatloaf sliders.

programme.title: Madhur Jaffrey
programme.desc: Madhur Jaffrey makes Potatoes Marwari Style and Ming serves a Japanese Chicken Curry.

programme.title: Rick Bayless
programme.desc: It’s East meets Southwest for master chef Rick Bayless and Ming Tsai!

programme.title: Johnny Iuzzini
programme.desc: Ming and Johnny Iuzzini show off new takes on the Dark and Stormy.

programme.title: Shaun Hergatt
programme.desc: Shaun Hergatt makes Acacia-Glazed Duck and Ming serves Thai Coconut Braised Duck Legs.

programme.title: Rocco DiSpirito
programme.desc: Rocco DiSpirito and Ming are nuts about almonds!

programme.title: Sam Hayward
programme.desc: Sam Hayward gives his take on shellfish, while Ming makes Wok-Stirred Thai King Crab Legs.

programme.title: Gunnar Hvarnes
programme.desc: Ming heads to Norway to see chef Gunnar Hvarnes--and create two delicious Cod dishes.

programme.title: Geir Skeier
programme.desc: Ming and chef Geir Skeier prep a traditional cocktail and cook with salmon.

programme.title: Bangladesh

programme.desc: Rick searches for the bombil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren hunt with Joe Rogan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Spring Break: Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: Nos cayeron los chahuiztles
programme.desc: Casimiro Pérez, el hermano de Magda llega de visita. Además, la madrastra de Lorena le trae una noticia que cambiará su situación económica.

programme.title: Adopción
programme.desc: Cris shows Pedro the adoption application but they will receive a visit from the social worker. Germán, on the other hand, will be pruning the trees outside the building, without imagining the problems that this would bring.

programme.title: Buzón de quejas
programme.desc: Los problemas en el edificio revivieron un buzón de quejas que ya estaba olvidado, pero este buzón traerá problemas a Luis y Silvia. Por otro lado Morris esta a punto de reprobar el año.

programme.title: Can guash
programme.desc: Pedro se aterra por la llegada de su suegro pues tiene miedo de que no se lleven bien, además Germán y Vanessa emprenden un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Oficinas de gobierno
programme.desc: Los vecinos aprovechan la apertura de unas nuevas oficinas de gobierno para emprender sus negocios y obtener algo de dinero, pero cuando Luis los descubre, intentará correrlos de la entrada del edificio.

programme.title: Llegada de Martina
programme.desc: Cris y Pablo están esperando a su hija Martina y, nerviosos por conocerla, preparan todo para recibirla. Por otro lado, Liz y Vanesa abren su tienda de ropa virtual y logran hacer un trato con Don Arturo.

programme.title: El gorrión de la canción
programme.desc: Dulce arrives at the building looking for the author of some songs to compose a new single for her. Also, Luis and Silvia meet the parents of one of their son's classmates.

programme.title: Alejandra godín
programme.desc: Arturo llega con la noticia de que Alejandra será una nueva empleada en la empresa donde trabaja. Por otro lado, una pequeña apuesta entre Germán y Birote crece sin control.

programme.title: Subasta
programme.desc: Magdalena se da cuenta que puede sacarle dinero a los objetos viejos de Arturo y se da a la tarea de hacer una subasta, carísima por cierto.

programme.title: Frankie publicista
programme.desc: Vanesa desesperada por salir de sus deudas, busca la ayuda de Frankie para diseñar la publicidad de su negocio, pero al final se da cuenta que el de las ideas realmente era otro.

programme.title: Oriundas
programme.desc: Magdalena receives an unexpected visit, a visit that will expose her past in Angangueo. Alejandra and Rocko try at all costs to take advantage of Magda's friend, who has always been in love with Arturo.

programme.title: Huele a muerto
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque en el edificio hay un olor a descompuesto que provoca que todos sean sospechosos. Frankie y familia temen que la desaparición de Rocko esté ligada a que los López Pérez están comiendo carne.

programme.title: El carro de Don Arturo
programme.desc: Luis se ha vuelto obsesivo con la limpieza y Silvia intentará hacer algo para que se le quite la obsesión. Además, los López Pérez se han ganado un carro de lujo y lo presumirán a todos los vecinos.

programme.title: La ley del Godín
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que en su trabajo, su padre es el mandadero y todos sus compañeros lo tratan mal. ¿Crees que Alejandra lo defenderá o también lo tratará mal? Además, Germán se siente mal desde hace unos días y no sabe qué enfermedad tendrá.

programme.title: Foto tatarabuelo
programme.desc: Luis recibe la visita de su tía Enriqueta, quien le regala un cuadro de su tatarabuelo pintado por Diego y Frida. Al compartirlo con sus vecinos, solo recibe críticas. Germán tiene un ataque de celos porque Jorjais tiene un nuevo mejor amigo.

programme.title: La real sociedad
programme.desc: Andrés Vaca llega al edificio para pagar un favor y los vecinos aprovechan su visita para organizar un equipo de fútbol, mientras que las vecinas se organizan para ser la porra del equipo.

programme.title: Bodón loco
programme.desc: La trabajadora social descubre que Pedro y Cris no están casados, por lo que, para conservar a su hija, deberán organizar la boda en 24 horas. ¿Crees que con la ayuda de los vecinos podrán realizar un bodón loco?

programme.title: Desazolve
programme.desc: Neighbors face problems with water pressure and need to unblock the pipes, but opt to invest the money in lottery tickets. Morris, on the other hand, is influenced by reggaeton.

programme.title: Ruido fantasma
programme.desc: Los vecinos escuchan un ruido estremecedor en el edificio y sospechan que es un fantasma, por lo que deciden realizar un ritual para expulsarlo. Mientras tanto, Morris busca empleo.

programme.title: Nos cayó la chaviza
programme.desc: Uno de los departamentos está en renta y Sofi, una chava muy positiva, tiene interés en rentarlo. Pero, ¿crees que los vecinos accedan a tener una nueva inquilina? Por otro lado, Luis y Silvia tendrán diferencias por Sandro, la ex pareja de Silvia.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
